name: Shenzhen HEKEDA Precision Cleaning Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen HEKEDA Precision Cleaning Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of LCD glass cleaning machines, ultrasound cleaning machines, plating equipment, and industrial water purifying equipment in China. The company offers flat panel cleaning equipment, ITO and TFT glass cleaning machines, touch panel cleaning machines, LCD glass cleaning machines, thin film solar cell cleaning machines, crystalline silicon solar equipment, auto glass cleaning machines, ultrasonic cleaning equipment, surface treatment equipment, water treatment equipment, and machine components and services, as well as precision cleaning equipment. It also provides pre-sales consulting and post-sales services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen HEKEDA Liquid Crystal Equipment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shenzhen HEKEDA Precision Cleaning Equipment Co., Ltd. in December 2012. Shenzhen HEKEDA Precision Cleaning Equipment Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
